name: Black Forest Pumpernickel Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Use the Light Crust setting on your bread maker.
3. Allow the bread to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
4. For added flavor, you can mix in 1 tsp. instant Espresso Powder.
5. The bread can also be finished baking in the oven after completing the dough cycle.
